workflow_judgment.reasoning: The persona attempted step 1 repeatedly but never received a response from the chief, blocking the entire workflow. No lab was identified, no expansion occurred, no lab agent view was read, no promotion happened, and no decision artifact was written. The transcript shows six turns consumed entirely on retrying the initial chat prompt before giving up. This is a critical failure of the triage entry point — the chief chat never produced output the persona could act on.
